case_title: PENG, JASON vs. QUAYLE, CAMERON PETER et al

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-21-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), FOR PROOF OF SERVICE OR A DISMISSAL. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. HEARING SET FOR JAN-30-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
